Sidebar.linkRiotAccountTooltip: Link Riot account in Settings first

Login.title: LoL Tracker
Login.description: Track your League of Legends games, coaching sessions, and improve your gameplay.
Login.errorInviteRequired: An invite code is required to create a new account.
Login.errorInviteInvalid: That invite code is invalid or has already been used.
Login.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Just sign in without a code.
Login.demoModeDescription: Select an account to explore the app with sample data.

Dashboard.heading: Dashboard
Dashboard.linkRiotAccount: Link your Riot account in <link>Settings</link> to get started.
Dashboard.noRankData: No rank data yet. Update your games to see your rank.
Dashboard.daysAgo: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} ago

Matches.heading: Matches
Matches.linkRiotAccount: Link your Riot account in <link>Settings</link> to import games.
Matches.noMatchesEmpty: No matches yet. Click Update Games to get started.

MatchDetail.reviewCtaWithNotes: This game has notes but hasn't been fully reviewed yet.
MatchDetail.reviewCtaWithoutNotes: This game hasn't been reviewed yet.
MatchDetail.reviewCtaSubtext: Head to the Review page to add highlights, notes, and VOD review.

Review.allCaughtUp: All caught up! No games waiting for review.
Review.gamesWaitingForReview: {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} waiting for review
Review.vodReviewNotesPlaceholder: What did you learn from watching the VOD?
Review.markAllReviewedConfirmDescription: This will skip VOD review for all remaining games. This action cannot be undone from this page.

emptyStates.noPostGameDescription: All games have been reviewed or are waiting for VOD review.
emptyStates.noVodReviewDescription: Complete post-game reviews first, then they'll appear here for VOD review.
emptyStates.noCompletedDescription: Reviewed games will appear here for reference.

Review.postGameHint: These games haven't been reviewed yet. Add highlights, notes, and optionally a VOD link.
Review.vodReviewHint: These games have post-game notes but haven't been VOD-reviewed yet. Watch the VOD and add your takeaways.
Review.reviewedGamesCount: {count, plural, one {# reviewed game} other {# reviewed games}}.

toasts.bulkMarkReviewed: Marked {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} as reviewed.
toasts.failedToMarkReviewed: Failed to mark games as reviewed.

Scout.pageDescription: Pre-game scouting report for your matchups.
Scout.noGamesFoundAsChampion: No past games found as {yourChampion} against {enemyChampion}.
Scout.clearYourChampionHint: Try clearing the "Your Champion" filter to see all games against this matchup.
Scout.selectEnemyPrompt: Select an enemy champion above to view your scouting report.

toasts.failedToLoadReport: Couldn't load the scouting report. Please try again.

Analytics.gamesAnalyzed: {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} analyzed.
Analytics.importGamesFirst: Import some games first to see your analytics.
Analytics.noDataYetDescription: Fetch your ranked games to see charts and statistics.
Analytics.notEnoughRankData: Not enough rank data yet. Play more ranked games to see your LP journey.
Analytics.coachingBandsDescription: Shaded areas show the time between coaching sessions.
Analytics.noMatchupData: No matchup data yet. Play more games to see win rates by matchup.
Analytics.noChampionData: No champion data yet. Play some games to see your champion stats.

Coaching.title: Coaching
Coaching.subtitleEmpty: Track your coaching sessions and improvement.
Coaching.subtitleSummary: {totalSessions, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} · {activeCount, plural, one {# active action item} other {# active action items}}
Coaching.emptyStateDescription: Schedule your first coaching session to start tracking your improvement.
Coaching.missingFocusAreasAndActionItems: Missing focus areas and action items
Coaching.intervalRelatedNotes: {count, plural, one {# related note} other {# related notes}}

toasts.updateActionItemError: Couldn't update the action item. Please try again.

CoachingDetail.sessionIsScheduledDescription: After your coaching, fill in notes and action items.
CoachingDetail.gamesDiscussed: {count, plural, one {# game discussed} other {# games discussed}}
CoachingDetail.actionItemsDescription: {completed}/{total} completed. Click the status icon to cycle through: pending → in progress → completed.
CoachingDetail.noActionItems: No action items for this session.
CoachingDetail.progressDescription: {count, plural, one {# game played} other {# games played}} since this coaching session.
CoachingDetail.noGamesSinceSession: No games played since this coaching session yet.
CoachingDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this coaching session? This cannot be undone.

CompleteSession.title: Complete Coaching Session
CompleteSession.subtitle: Fill in what was discussed and create action items.
CompleteSession.topicsCoveredDescription: Select all topics that were actually covered during the session.
CompleteSession.sessionNotesPlaceholder: Key takeaways, what the coach said, areas to focus on...
CompleteSession.actionItemsDescription: What should you work on before the next coaching session?

toasts.topicRequired: Please select at least one topic covered.

EditSession.title: Edit Coaching Session
EditSession.subtitle: Update session details.
EditSession.vodToReviewDescription: Select a game to review during the session.
EditSession.noHighlights: No highlights or lowlights recorded for this match.
EditSession.focusAreasDescription: Topics you want to focus on during the session.
EditSession.topicsCoveredDescription: Topics that were covered during the session.
EditSession.sessionNotesPlaceholder: Key takeaways, what the coach said, areas to focus on...

ActionItems.title: Action Items
ActionItems.emptyStateDescription: Create coaching sessions to add action items.
ActionItems.deleteConfirm: Delete this action item? This cannot be undone.

ScheduleSession.title: Schedule Coaching Session
ScheduleSession.subtitle: Book a session — you'll fill in notes and action items after the coaching.
ScheduleSession.vodToReviewDescription: Optionally select the game you want to review — you can add this later.
ScheduleSession.noMatchesFound: No matches found. Import your games first.
ScheduleSession.noHighlights: No highlights or lowlights recorded for this game.
ScheduleSession.focusAreasDescription: Optionally note what you want to focus on — topics will be finalized after the session.

Duo.title: Duo Partner
Duo.descriptionDefault: Track your performance when playing with your duo partner.

noPartner.title: No Duo Partner Set
noPartner.description: Configure your duo partner in Settings to start tracking your shared games, win rates, and champion synergies.

noGames.title: No Duo Games Found
noGames.description: Your synced matches haven't been scanned for duo games yet. Scan your existing matches or sync new games to get started.

synergy.title: Champion Synergy
synergy.emptyState: No champion synergy data yet. Play more duo games to see your best champion combos.

recentGames.title: Recent Duo Games
recentGames.emptyDescription: Sync your matches to detect games played with your duo partner.

toasts.backfillSuccess: Found {duoFound} duo games out of {processed} matches scanned!
toasts.backfillNone: Scanned {processed} matches but no duo games were found. Try syncing more games first.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage your account and Riot Games integration.

riotAccount.title: Riot Account
riotAccount.description: Link your Riot Games account to sync your ranked games automatically.
riotAccount.unlinkHelpText: Unlinking will not delete your imported match data.
riotAccount.linkHelpText: Enter your Riot ID in GameName#TagLine format. This is used to import your ranked match history.

languageCard.title: Language & Region
languageCard.description: Choose your language and how dates and numbers are displayed.

duoPartner.title: Duo Partner
duoPartner.description: Choose your duo partner to track shared games and synergy stats.
duoPartner.selectPrompt: Select a registered user as your duo partner:
duoPartner.noUsersFound: No other users with linked Riot accounts found. Invite a friend to get started!

invites.title: Invite Friends
invites.description: Generate invite codes to let friends create accounts.
invites.emptyState: No invite codes yet. Generate one to share with friends.

toasts.riotIdFormatError: Please enter your Riot ID as GameName#TagLine (e.g. beagleknight#euw)
toasts.deleteConfirm: Delete this invite code? This cannot be undone.

Errors.title: Something went wrong
Errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or go back to the dashboard.

codes.USER_NOT_FOUND: User not found or has no linked Riot account.
codes.TOPIC_REQUIRED: Please select at least one topic covered.

Changelog.title: What's New
Changelog.subtitle: Latest updates and improvements to LoL Tracker
Changelog.empty: No updates yet. Check back soon!

Goals.title: Goals
Goals.subtitle: Set rank targets and track your progress.
Goals.noActiveGoalDescription: Set a rank target to track your climb.
Goals.overdue: Deadline passed on {date} — goal is still active.
Goals.retireConfirm: Retire this goal? You can set a new one after.
Goals.deleteConfirm: Delete this goal? This cannot be undone.
Goals.newGoalSubtitle: Set a rank target to track your climb.
Goals.noRankData: No rank data available. Sync your account first to set a goal.
Goals.targetRankDescription: Choose the rank you want to reach.
Goals.targetMustBeHigher: Target rank must be higher than your current rank.
Goals.deadlineHelp: A soft deadline — your goal stays active even after this date.
